memoryLane.name: Phase 13: Lighthouse Audit & Core Web Vitals Optimization
memoryLane.focus: PERFORMANCE MEASUREMENT & OPTIMIZATION — Lighthouse scores, Core Web Vitals
scope: Run Lighthouse audit on all major pages (home, about, services, projects, news-hub, contact)
Measure current Core Web Vitals: LCP, INP, CLS
Optimize image loading (formats, lazy-loading, responsive sizes)
Optimize CSS delivery (critical CSS, deferred non-critical)
Target: 75+ Lighthouse score on all pages, green Core Web Vitals

success_criteria.lighthouse_score: 75+ on Performance, Accessibility, Best Practices, SEO

test_coverage.lighthouse_ci: Automated Lighthouse CI checks on all PRs

memoryLane.blockers: None — Phase 13 starts after Phase 12 completes
